mapper.sql: select family_id, family_code, family_name, owner_name, family_sort, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from fin_family

select m.member_id, m.family_id, f.family_name, m.member_name, m.member_role, m.risk_level, m.contact_phone, m.member_sort, m.status, m.del_flag, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark from fin_member_account m left join fin_family f on f.family_id = m.family_id
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
and family_code like concat('%', #{familyCode}, '%')
and family_name like concat('%', #{familyName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by family_sort asc, family_id desc
where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' order by family_sort asc, family_id asc
where m.del_flag = '0' and m.status = '0' and m.family_id = #{familyId} order by m.member_sort asc, m.member_id asc
